questionHtml:
What is the molecular formula of a compound with an empirical formula of CHO2 and a relative molecular mass of 90?

A.  CHO2

B.  C2H2O4

C.  C3H6O3

D.  C4H10O2

meta.title: What is the molecular formula of a compound with an empirical formula of CHO2 and a relative molecular mass of 90? A. CHO2 B. C2H2O4 C. C3H6O3 D. C4H10O2
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter
Structure 1.4—Counting particles by mass: The mole

Structure 1.4.4—The empirical formula of a compound gives the simplest ratio of atoms of each element present in that compound. The molecular formula gives the actual number of atoms of each element present in a molecule. Interconvert the percentage composition by mass and the empirical formula. Determine the molecular formula of a compound from its empirical formula and molar mass.
